drills.name: Grip Practice
drills.description: Practice correct grip technique for forehand and backhand strokes

drills.name: Court Movement Patterns
drills.description: Basic footwork patterns covering all six court positions

drills.name: Shadow Practice
drills.description: Movement without shuttle focusing on footwork and body positioning

weeks.objective: Establish proper grip habits and develop basic court coverage skills

drills.name: High Clear Practice
drills.description: Repetitive forehand clear shots to baseline with focus on technique

drills.name: Drop Shot Accuracy
drills.description: Forehand drop shots targeting net area with controlled power

drills.name: Clear to Drop Combination
drills.description: Alternating between clear and drop shots to develop versatility

weeks.objective: Master forehand overhead strokes with control and accuracy

drills.name: Backhand Clear Drills
drills.description: Developing power and accuracy in backhand overhead clear

drills.name: Net Shot Practice
drills.description: Forehand and backhand net shots with soft touch and precision

drills.name: Net Rush Drills
drills.description: Quick movement to net and recovery with proper technique

weeks.objective: Build backhand confidence and improve front court control

drills.name: High Service Practice
drills.description: Consistent high service to backcourt with proper form

drills.name: Low Service Precision
drills.description: Short service landing just over net with minimal height

drills.name: Return Positioning
drills.description: Proper stance and return technique for various service types

weeks.objective: Develop consistent and strategic service skills with effective returns

drills.name: Smash Power Development
drills.description: Building explosive power in smash with proper body rotation

drills.name: Defensive Lift Practice
drills.description: Returning smashes with controlled lifts to backcourt

drills.name: Block and Counter
drills.description: Blocking smashes and transitioning to counter-attack

weeks.objective: Improve attacking power and develop defensive resilience

drills.name: Sustained Rally Practice
drills.description: Maintaining rallies with focus on consistency and placement

drills.name: Shot Variation Drills
drills.description: Mixing clears, drops, and drives to develop unpredictability

drills.name: Tempo Change Practice
drills.description: Controlling rally speed from slow build-up to fast exchanges

weeks.objective: Master rally management with strategic shot selection and tempo control

drills.name: Controlled Match Play
drills.description: Practice matches with specific tactical objectives

drills.name: Pressure Situations
drills.description: Playing critical points with emphasis on mental composure

drills.name: Score Management
drills.description: Strategic play based on score situations and momentum

drills.name: Skills Assessment
drills.description: Formal evaluation of all stroke categories with scoring

drills.name: Weakness Targeting
drills.description: Focused practice on individual weaknesses identified during cycle

drills.name: Free Play and Feedback
drills.description: Open play sessions with coach observation and feedback

weeks.objective: Complete cycle assessment and identify focus areas for next cycle

drills.name: Multi-Directional Lunges
drills.description: Advanced footwork patterns with explosive directional changes

drills.description: Ladder drills and cone exercises for improved court speed

drills.description: Efficient return to center court after each shot

drills.description: Cross-court and straight slice drops with deception

drills.description: Using slice technique to disguise shot direction

drills.description: Varying service types with similar preparation

drills.name: Steep Smash Practice

drills.description: Quick exchanges at net requiring fast reflexes
